# cmccloudv2_rds_cluster_flavor (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
# get rds cluster flavor by name 
data "cmccloudv2_rds_cluster_flavor" "flavor_1" {
    name = "db.t1.micro"  
}

# get rds cluster flavor by id
data "cmccloudv2_rds_cluster_flavor" "flavor_2" {
    flavor_id = "c9b0f96d-e72d-48f3-b89f-cfb605ab193c" 
}

# get rds cluster flavor by CPU & RAM 
data "cmccloudv2_rds_cluster_flavor" "flavor_3" {
    cpu = 1
    ram = 2
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `cpu` (Number) Filter by number of vcpus of flavor
- `flavor_id` (String) Id of the flavor
- `name` (String) Filter by name of flavor (case-insenitive), match exactly
- `ram` (Number) Filter by ram size (GB) of flavor

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
